01 — About Me

Engineering Excellence Across Domains

Location

Current Role
Mechanical Engineer, NUST

MS Design & Mfg.
LinkedIn
muhammadhussain1024

A mechanical engineer with a strong foundation in defence production, manufacturing processes, and academic research — now channelling that experience into engineering education and advanced MS-level research at NUST and COMSATS.

My work spans additive manufacturing research, FEA simulation, IoT systems, and data analytics — a unique blend forged through internships at Pakistan's premier defence organizations.

Currently pursuing an MS in Design & Manufacturing at COMSATS with a perfect 4.0 CGPA, focusing on FDM process optimization and AI-driven quality control.

Super Mall Sales Dashboard
End-to-end Power BI dashboard analyzing retail performance across regions. Features dual-year trend lines, ship mode and category breakdowns, geo-bubble state map, and interactive region slicers.

★ Featured · Final Year Project
SolidWorks · Arduino · PLA · UN SDG-9 & 13
Filament Extruder Redesign & Spooling Mechanism
Redesigned a bench-top extruder producing 1.75mm ±0.1mm PLA filaments from recycled 3D printer waste. Arduino-controlled spooling with optimized 180–190°C extrusion. Cost reduced to Rs.1,045/kg vs Rs.4,200/kg market (75% saving). Power: 1.117 kWh/cycle.
SolidWorksArduino IDEPLA/RecyclingThermodynamicsFYP · Published
ESP32 · Arduino IDE · IoT Cloud
IoT Home Automation System
Full smart-home ecosystem: Bluetooth voice-controlled TV, IoT Cloud app for appliance management, and Arduino UNO password-protected door. Circuit designed manually, validated on Tinkercad.
ESP32Arduino IDEIoT CloudBluetoothTinkercad
ANSYS FEA · Structural Analysis · IJEAST Published
Hino Truck Ladder Chassis — Structural Optimization
FEA study comparing C-channel, I-channel, and hollow rectangular cross-sections under operational loads. Von Mises and max shear stress computed — I & C sections safe; hollow rectangular geometry fails. Published in IJEAST ↗
ANSYS WorkbenchVon MisesFEAIJEAST Published
SolidWorks · Aerospace CAD · Photorealistic Rendering
F-16 Fighting Falcon — Full CAD Model
Modelled the F-16 from orthographic top/side/front reference views in SolidWorks. Auxiliary components (engine, fire end, armaments) modelled separately and assembled. Full photorealistic render with multi-material assignments.
SolidWorksOrthographic ModellingAssemblyAerospace
Python · Streamlit · Rotordynamics · Live Web App
Static & Dynamic Rotor Balancing Simulator
Interactive simulator for static and dynamic rotor balancing. Calculates balance mass, angular positions, and residual force with real-time polar plots and vector diagrams — deployed as a live Streamlit web app.
PythonStreamlitmatplotlibRotordynamicsLive App ↗
▶ Launch Live App
◆ Additional Engineering Work
🏗️
2-DOF Building Vibration
Spring-mass modal analysis in MATLAB + ANSYS. Physical model fabricated with steel plates; validated via NI DAQ real-time experiment.
🛞
Disc Brake Thermal & Structural FEA
Coupled thermal-structural ANSYS simulation on rotor-disc-pad assembly. Peak temperature: 495°C. Deformation and stress safety validated.
🔬
Topology Optimization & Drop Test
Minimum-mass optimization of triangular plate under pressure constraints. Drop test impact simulation with fracture criteria on ANSYS.
⚙️
Gearbox Modal Analysis
Resonance frequency mapping using ANSYS modal solver. Mode shapes and natural frequencies extracted for vibration safety assessment.
